reason: This is a simple Quranic verse quote without any extremist context or interpretation. It's a common religious reference about Prophet Hud preaching monotheism to his people.
taxonomy_labels: Religion and Spirituality -> Islamic Teachings and Quotes
original_post: (وإلى عاد أخاهم هودا قال يا قوم اعبدوا الله ما لكم من إله غيره إن أنتم إلا مفترون) [هود50]72r
